name: Avocados with Roquefort
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mash the Roquefort cheese with minced fresh parsley until a coarse paste is formed.
2. Whisk together olive oil and 2 tablespoons of fresh lemon juice in a small bowl. Stir this mixture into the cheese mixture. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Cut each avocado lengthwise in half and remove the pits. Scoop out two-thirds of the flesh from each avocado half, leaving a thin shell, and add it to the cheese mixture. Mix well.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
5. Sprinkle the remaining lemon juice over the insides of the avocado shells. Place them on a serving plate lined with Boston lettuce leaves.
6. Spoon the cheese mixture into the avocado shells, dividing evenly.
7. Garnish with sliced ripe olives.
